mapper.sql: l.lodging_id AS lodgingId, l.lodging_name AS lodgingName, l.monthly_price AS monthlyPrice, l.capacity AS capacity, l.latitude AS latitude, l.longitude AS longitude, l.address_basic AS addressBasic, l.address_detail AS addressDetail, l.review_total AS reviewTotal, l.summary AS summary, l.description AS description, l.average_rating AS averageRating, l.rule AS rule, COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT a.amenity_name SEPARATOR ' '), '') AS amenityText, ( SELECT COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t.tag_name SEPARATOR ' '), '') FROM lodging_tag lt INNER JOIN tag t ON t.tag_id = lt.tag_id WHERE lt.lodging_id = l.lodging_id ) AS tagText, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(a.amenity_name) LIKE '%wifi%' OR LOWER(a.amenity_name) LIKE '%wi-fi%' OR a.amenity_name LIKE '%와이파이%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS wifi, LEAST(1.0, SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(a.amenity_name) REGEXP 'cctv|security|safe|alarm|lock|소화기|경비|도어락|안전|fire' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 3.0 ) AS safetyScore
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM lodging l LEFT JOIN lodging_amenity la ON la.lodging_id = l.lodging_id LEFT JOIN amenity a ON a.amenity_id = la.amenity_id WHERE l.lodging_id IN
#{lodgingId}
GROUP BY l.lodging_id
